name: myrealtrip-weekly-campaign-copilot
description: Generate weekly travel campaign plans from public signals and MyRealTrip owned-channel content.

interface.shortDescription: Plan weekly travel campaigns from public evidence.
interface.longDescription: Collects public travel signals, normalizes owned-channel and public data, recommends evidence-backed destinations, and generates campaign assets plus a static HTML report.
defaultPrompt: Generate this week's MyRealTrip campaign report.
Collect public travel signals and recommend campaigns.
Create Instagram, Facebook, and Naver Blog drafts.
